Note on Chinese audio
fields.definition:
Although text is different between simplified and traditional Chinese, audio should be the same.
Cantonese? Mandarin? I don't know.

fields.name: PLAYER SPAWN INFLUENCERS
fields.definition: These are things that influence player spawn points

fields.name: ENEMY FORBID
fields.definition: This is a tight cylinder around the player with a strong negative weight. It serves to protect players from spawning close to an enemy, or having and enemy spawn close to them.

fields.name: ENEMY BIAS
fields.definition: This is a larger cylinder, with a size set specifically for the size of the map. It has a weak negative weight which falls to zero towards the outer radius. It serves to bias players away from spawning near enemies, or in enemy held areas.

fields.name: ALLY BIAS
fields.definition: This is a larger cylinder, with a size set specifically for the size of the map. It has a weak positive weight which falls to zero towards the outer radius. It serves to bias players towards spawning with allies, or in areas which are controlled by friendly players.

fields.name: SELECTED ALLY BIAS
fields.definition: Same as ALLY BIAS, but used when the ally is selected in the dead-camera.

fields.name: DEAD TEAMMATE BIAS
fields.definition: Dead teammate influences are cylinders centered upon the body of a dead teammate (or the players own dead body).

fields.name: WEAPON INFLUENCERS
fields.definition: These influencers are induced by weapons either wielded or carried in the player's backpack

fields.name: VEHICLE INFLUENCERS
fields.definition: These influencers are induced by vehicles.

fields.name: PROJECTILE INFLUENCERS
fields.definition: These influencers are induced by projectiles.

fields.name: EQUIPMENT INFLUENCERS
fields.definition: These influencers are induced by equipment.

fields.name: AUTO TURRET INFLUENCERS
fields.definition: These influencers are induced by vehicles flagged as auto turrets

fields.name: KOTH HILL INFLUENCER
fields.definition: This influencer is induced by the King of the Hill hill goal area.

fields.name: ODDBALL INFLUENCER
fields.definition: This influencer is induced by the oddball.

fields.name: CTF FLAG AWAY INFLUENCER
fields.definition: This influencer is induced by the CTF flag stand when the flag is away.

fields.name: TERRITORY ALLY INFLUENCER
fields.definition: This influencer is induced by territories controlled by teammates.

fields.name: TERRITORY ENEMY INFLUENCER
fields.definition: This influencer is induced by territories controlled by an enemy.

fields.name: INFECTION SAFE ZONE HUMAN INFLUENCER
fields.definition: This influencer is induced by an infection safe zone upon humans.

fields.name: INFECTION SAFE ZONE ZOMBIE INFLUENCER
fields.definition: This influencer is induced by an infection safe zone upon zombies.

fields.name: VIP INFLUENCER
fields.definition: This influencer is induced by a VIP upon his teammates.

fields.name: RESPAWN STRINGS
fields.definition:
These are used for respawn status message displays
The text comes from the in-game-text multiplayer message strings list tag
in the multiplayer runtime globals block above

fields.name: spawn at player allowed looking at self
spawn at player allowed looking at target
spawn at player allowed looking at potential target
spawn at territory allowed looking at target
spawn at territory allowed looking at potential target
targetted player too far from owned flag

options: game over (you lost, but game tied)
